nasb.text: But he does not know that the dead are there, That her guests are in the depths of Sheol.

esv.text: But he does not know that the dead are there, that her guests are in the depths of Sheol.

cnv.text: 人卻不知道她那裡有陰魂， 她的客人是在陰間的深處。

ccb.text: 他们却不知她那里鬼影憧憧， 她的客人已落在阴间的深处。

csbs.text: 但那人不知道：阴魂就在那里； 被她呼唤去的，都在阴间的深处。
